name: procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month tool
description: For procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause service interruptions. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of contract dates using spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
problem_solved: Missed contract renewals leading to service interruptions and potential penalties.
